title: L RICH Mini Project 01
text:
#' Acquire IPEDS Data for MP#01
#' 
#' This function will acquire and standardize all data for MP#01
#' from IPEDS (https://nces.ed.gov/ipeds/datacenter/DataFiles.aspx)
#' 
#' We're starting in 2010 as the data seems to be reasonably complete 
#' after that point. 
acquire_ipeds_data <- function(start_year=2010, end_year=2024){
    library(tidyverse)
    library(glue)
    
    data_dir <- file.path("data", "mp01")
    
    if(!dir.exists(data_dir)){
        dir.create(data_dir, showWarnings=FALSE, recursive=TRUE)
    }
    
    YEARS <- seq(start_year, end_year)
    
    EFA_ALL <- map(YEARS, function(yy){
        if(yy <= 2022){
            ef_url <- glue("https://nces.ed.gov/ipeds/datacenter/data/EF{yy}A.zip")
            
        } else {
            ef_url <- glue("https://nces.ed.gov/ipeds/data-generator?year={yy}&tableName=EF{yy}A&HasRV=0&type=csv")
        }
        
        ef_file <- file.path(data_dir, glue("ef{yy}a.csv.zip"))
        
        if(!file.exists(ef_file)){
            message(glue("Downloading Enrollment Data for {yy} from {ef_url}"))
            download.file(ef_url, destfile = ef_file, quiet=TRUE, mode="wb")    
        }
        
        read_csv(ef_file, 
                 show_col_types=FALSE) |>
            mutate(year = yy, 
                   # American Indian or Alaskan Native
                   enrollment_m_aian = EFAIANM, 
                   enrollment_f_aian = EFAIANW, 
                   # Asian
                   enrollment_m_asia = EFASIAM, 
                   enrollment_f_asia = EFASIAW, 
                   # Black or African-American, 
                   enrollment_m_bkaa = EFBKAAM, 
                   enrollment_f_bkaa = EFBKAAW, 
                   # Hispanic 
                   enrollment_m_hisp = EFHISPM, 
                   enrollment_f_hisp = EFHISPW, 
                   # Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander 
                   enrollment_m_nhpi = EFNHPIM, 
                   enrollment_f_nhpi = EFNHPIW, 
                   # White
                   enrollment_m_whit = EFWHITM, 
                   enrollment_f_whit = EFWHITW, 
                   # Two or More Races
                   enrollment_m_2mor = EF2MORM, 
                   enrollment_f_2mor = EF2MORW, 
                   # Unknown / Undisclosed Race
                   enrollment_m_unkn = EFUNKNM, 
                   enrollment_f_unkn = EFUNKNW, 
                   # US Non-Resident
                   enrollment_m_nral = EFNRALM, 
                   enrollment_f_nral = EFNRALW, 
            ) |> filter(
                (EFALEVEL %in% c(2, 12)) | (LINE %in% c(1, 15))
                # Per 2024 Data Dictionary, 
                # - EFALEVEL 2 = undergrad 
                # - EFALELVE 12 = grad
                # - Line 1 = first year first time full-time undergrad
                # - Line 15 = first year first time part-time undergrad
            ) |> mutate(level = case_when(
                       EFALEVEL == 2 ~ "all undergrad", 
                       EFALEVEL == 12 ~ "all graduate",
                       LINE %in% c(1, 15) ~ "first year undergrad"
                   )
            ) |>
            select(institution_id = UNITID, 
                   year, 
                   level,
                   starts_with("enrollment_")) |>
            group_by(institution_id, 
                     year, 
                     level) |>
            summarize(across(starts_with("enrollment_"), sum), 
                      .groups = "drop")
        
    }) |> bind_rows()
    
    DESC_ALL <- map(YEARS, function(yy){
        if(yy <= 2022){
            hd_url <- glue("https://nces.ed.gov/ipeds/datacenter/data/HD{yy}.zip")
            
        } else {
            hd_url <- glue("https://nces.ed.gov/ipeds/data-generator?year={yy}&tableName=HD{yy}&HasRV=0&type=csv")
        }
        
        hd_file <- file.path(data_dir, glue("hd{yy}.csv.zip"))
        
        if(!file.exists(hd_file)){
            message(glue("Downloading Institutional Descriptions for {yy} from {hd_url}"))
            download.file(hd_url, destfile = hd_file, quiet=TRUE, mode="wb")    
        }
        
        suppressWarnings(
            read_csv(hd_file, 
                 show_col_types=FALSE, 
                 locale=locale(encoding=if_else(yy==2024, "utf-8", "windows-1252"))) |>
            mutate(year = yy, 
                   INSTNM) |> 
            select(institution_id = UNITID, 
                   institution_name = INSTNM, 
                   state = STABBR, 
                   year)
        )
        
    }) |> bind_rows()
    
    inner_join(EFA_ALL, 
               DESC_ALL, 
               join_by(institution_id == institution_id, 
                       year == year))
}

IPEDS <- acquire_ipeds_data()

ŌöĆŌöĆ Attaching core tidyverse packages ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆ tidyverse 2.0.0 ŌöĆŌöĆ

# True because "CUNY" (2nd arg) is in the longer string (1st arg)
str_detect("CUNY Bernard M. Baruch College", "CUNY")

[1] TRUE

# False because "Hunter" is nowhere in the first argument
str_detect("CUNY Bernard M. Baruch College", "Hunter")

[1] FALSE

names <- c("City College-Miami", "CUNY City College", "CUNY Hunter College")
str_detect(names, "CUNY")

[1] FALSE  TRUE  TRUE

# Look at data
head(IPEDS, 10)

#   enrollment_m_bkaa <dbl>, enrollment_f_bkaa <dbl>, enrollment_m_hisp <dbl>,
#   enrollment_f_hisp <dbl>, enrollment_m_nhpi <dbl>, enrollment_f_nhpi <dbl>,
#   enrollment_m_whit <dbl>, enrollment_f_whit <dbl>, enrollment_m_2mor <dbl>,
#   enrollment_f_2mor <dbl>, enrollment_m_unkn <dbl>, enrollment_f_unkn <dbl>,
#   enrollment_m_nral <dbl>, enrollment_f_nral <dbl>, institution_name <chr>,
#   state <chr>

# is CUNY
IPEDS <- IPEDS |>
    mutate(is_cuny = str_detect(institution_name, "CUNY"))
    
# Check that is CUNY worked
head(IPEDS |> select(institution_name, is_cuny), 10)

# A tibble: 10 ├Ś 2
   institution_name                    is_cuny
   <chr>                               <lgl>

10 University of Alabama at Huntsville FALSE  

# Cali
IPEDS <- IPEDS |>
    mutate(
        is_calpublic =
            str_detect(institution_name, "University of California") |
            str_detect(institution_name, "California State")
    )

# Check data
IPEDS |>
    filter(is_calpublic) |>
    distinct(institution_id, institution_name, state) |>
    arrange(institution_name)

10         110556 California State University-Fresno               CA   
# Ōä╣ 23 more rows

# Loyola

# Base table with Grand Total
Loyola_yearly <- IPEDS |>
  filter(institution_name == "Loyola University Maryland") |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(
    aian        = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE),
    asian       = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE),
    black       = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE),
    hispanic    = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE),
    nhpi        = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE),
    white       = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE),
    two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE),
    unknown     = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE),
    nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    `Grand Total` = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi +
                    white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident
  )

# Loyola: YoY % change
Loyola_yearly_pct <- Loyola_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_grand_total =
      (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) / lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )

# National: 

# Base table with Grand Total
IPEDS_yearly <- IPEDS |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(
    aian        = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE),
    asian       = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE),
    black       = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE),
    hispanic    = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE),
    nhpi        = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE),
    white       = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE),
    two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE),
    unknown     = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE),
    nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    `Grand Total` = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi +
                    white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident
  )

# National: YoY % change
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_grand_total =
      (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) / lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )
  
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_aian        = (aian        - lag(aian))        / lag(aian)        * 100,
    pct_asian       = (asian       - lag(asian))       / lag(asian)       * 100,
    pct_black       = (black       - lag(black))       / lag(black)       * 100,
    pct_hispanic    = (hispanic    - lag(hispanic))    / lag(hispanic)    * 100,
    pct_nhpi        = (nhpi        - lag(nhpi))        / lag(nhpi)        * 100,
    pct_white       = (white       - lag(white))       / lag(white)       * 100,
    pct_two_or_more = (two_or_more - lag(two_or_more)) / lag(two_or_more) * 100,
    pct_unknown     = (unknown     - lag(unknown))     / lag(unknown)     * 100,
    pct_nonresident = (nonresident - lag(nonresident)) / lag(nonresident) * 100,
    pct_grand_total = (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) /
                      lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )
  
# Loyola: YoY % change
Loyola_yearly_pct <- Loyola_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_aian        = (aian        - lag(aian))        / lag(aian)        * 100,
    pct_asian       = (asian       - lag(asian))       / lag(asian)       * 100,
    pct_black       = (black       - lag(black))       / lag(black)       * 100,
    pct_hispanic    = (hispanic    - lag(hispanic))    / lag(hispanic)    * 100,
    pct_nhpi        = (nhpi        - lag(nhpi))        / lag(nhpi)        * 100,
    pct_white       = (white       - lag(white))       / lag(white)       * 100,
    pct_two_or_more = (two_or_more - lag(two_or_more)) / lag(two_or_more) * 100,
    pct_unknown     = (unknown     - lag(unknown))     / lag(unknown)     * 100,
    pct_nonresident = (nonresident - lag(nonresident)) / lag(nonresident) * 100,
    pct_grand_total = (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) /
                      lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )

#' Library GT
library(gt)

#' View tables
IPEDS_yearly_pct |> gt()

#' Formatting
format_gt_table <- function(gt_table, title_text) {
  gt_table |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = c(
        aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white,
        two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, `Grand Total`
      ),
      decimals = 0
    ) |>
    fmt_percent(
      columns = starts_with("pct_"),
      decimals = 1,
      scale_values = FALSE
    ) |>
    fmt_missing(
      columns = everything(),
      missing_text = "-"
    ) |>
    tab_header(
      title = md(glue("**{title_text}**"))
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
    )
}

#' View national table with formatting
IPEDS_yearly_pct |>
  gt() |>
  format_gt_table("National enrollment YoY trends")

title: LAUREN RICH MINI PROJECTS
text:
About me:


Vice President Analytics, Dog Lover, 200 YTT Certified, UTSA 3.0, Plant-based, MS Statistics Graduate Student


Last Updated: Friday 03 13, 2026 at 19:17PM

title: 1. Loyola: Base table with Grand Total
text:
1. Loyola: Base table with Grand Total
Loyola_yearly <- IPEDS |> filter(institution_name == ŌĆ£Loyola University MarylandŌĆØ) |> group_by(year) |> summarize( aian = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE), asian = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE), black = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE), hispanic = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE), nhpi = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE), white = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE), two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE), unknown = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE), nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = ŌĆ£dropŌĆØ ) |> mutate( Grand Total = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi + white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident )


2. Loyola: YoY % change for Grand Total
Loyola_yearly_pct <- Loyola_yearly |> mutate( pct_grand_total = (Grand Total - lag(Grand Total)) / lag(Grand Total) * 100 )


1. IPEDS: Base table with Grand Total
IPEDS_yearly <- IPEDS |> group_by(year) |> summarize( aian = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE), asian = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE), black = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE), hispanic = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE), nhpi = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE), white = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE), two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE), unknown = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE), nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = ŌĆ£dropŌĆØ ) |> mutate( Grand Total = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi + white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident )


2. IPEDS: YoY % change for Grand Total
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |> mutate( pct_grand_total = (Grand Total - lag(Grand Total)) / lag(Grand Total) * 100 )


Preview names
names(IPEDS_yearly_pct)


Basic GT table
IPEDS_yearly_pct |> gt() |> fmt_number( columns = c( aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white, two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, Grand Total ), decimals = 0 ) |> fmt_percent( columns = pct_grand_total, decimals = 1, scale_values = FALSE ) |> cols_label( Grand Total = ŌĆ£Grand TotalŌĆØ, pct_grand_total = ŌĆ£YoY % Change (Grand Total)ŌĆØ )


Expanded YoY % change table (all races + total)
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |> mutate( pct_aian = (aian - lag(aian)) / lag(aian) * 100, pct_asian = (asian - lag(asian)) / lag(asian) * 100, pct_black = (black - lag(black)) / lag(black) * 100, pct_hispanic = (hispanic - lag(hispanic)) / lag(hispanic) * 100, pct_nhpi = (nhpi - lag(nhpi)) / lag(nhpi) * 100, pct_white = (white - lag(white)) / lag(white) * 100, pct_two_or_more = (two_or_more - lag(two_or_more)) / lag(two_or_more) * 100, pct_unknown = (unknown - lag(unknown)) / lag(unknown) * 100, pct_nonresident = (nonresident - lag(nonresident)) / lag(nonresident) * 100, pct_grand_total = (Grand Total - lag(Grand Total)) / lag(Grand Total) * 100 )


Full GT table with YoY % for all groups
IPEDS_yearly_pct |> gt() |> fmt_number( columns = c( aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white, two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, Grand Total ), decimals = 0 ) |> fmt_percent( columns = c( pct_aian, pct_asian, pct_black, pct_hispanic, pct_nhpi, pct_white, pct_two_or_more, pct_unknown, pct_nonresident, pct_grand_total ), decimals = 1, scale_values = FALSE ) |> cols_label( year = ŌĆ£YearŌĆØ, aian = ŌĆ£AIANŌĆØ, asian = ŌĆ£AsianŌĆØ, black = ŌĆ£BlackŌĆØ, hispanic = ŌĆ£HispanicŌĆØ, nhpi = ŌĆ£NHPIŌĆØ, white = ŌĆ£WhiteŌĆØ, two_or_more = ŌĆ£Two or MoreŌĆØ, unknown = ŌĆ£UnknownŌĆØ, nonresident = ŌĆ£NonresidentŌĆØ, Grand Total = ŌĆ£Grand TotalŌĆØ, pct_aian = ŌĆ£YoY % AIANŌĆØ, pct_asian = ŌĆ£YoY % AsianŌĆØ, pct_black = ŌĆ£YoY % BlackŌĆØ, pct_hispanic = ŌĆ£YoY % HispanicŌĆØ, pct_nhpi = ŌĆ£YoY % NHPIŌĆØ, pct_white = ŌĆ£YoY % WhiteŌĆØ, pct_two_or_more = ŌĆ£YoY % Two+ŌĆØ, pct_unknown = ŌĆ£YoY % UnknownŌĆØ, pct_nonresident = ŌĆ£YoY % NonresidentŌĆØ, pct_grand_total = ŌĆ£YoY % Grand TotalŌĆØ ) |> tab_style( style = list(cell_text(weight = ŌĆ£boldŌĆØ, transform = ŌĆ£uppercaseŌĆØ)), locations = cells_column_labels(everything()) )


1. Base table with Grand Total (NATIONAL TOTALS)
IPEDS_yearly <- IPEDS |> group_by(year) |> summarize( aian = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE), asian = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE), black = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE), hispanic = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE), nhpi = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE), white = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE), two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE), unknown = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE), nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = ŌĆ£dropŌĆØ ) |> mutate( Grand Total = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi + white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident )


2. Add YoY % change for Grand Total
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |> mutate( pct_grand_total = (Grand Total - lag(Grand Total)) / lag(Grand Total) * 100 )


Build IPEDS_yearly


(already done above)


Build IPEDS_yearly_pct


(already done above)
names(IPEDS_yearly_pct)
IPEDS_yearly_pct |> gt() |> fmt_number( columns = c( aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white, two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, Grand Total ), decimals = 0 ) |> fmt_percent( columns = pct_grand_total, decimals = 1, scale_values = FALSE ) |> cols_label( Grand Total = ŌĆ£Grand TotalŌĆØ, pct_grand_total = ŌĆ£YoY % Change (Grand Total)ŌĆØ )


Expanded YoY % change table (all race groups + total)
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |> mutate( pct_aian = (aian - lag(aian)) / lag(aian) * 100, pct_asian = (asian - lag(asian)) / lag(asian) * 100, pct_black = (black - lag(black)) / lag(black) * 100, pct_hispanic = (hispanic - lag(hispanic)) / lag(hispanic) * 100, pct_nhpi = (nhpi - lag(nhpi)) / lag(nhpi) * 100, pct_white = (white - lag(white)) / lag(white) * 100, pct_two_or_more = (two_or_more - lag(two_or_more)) / lag(two_or_more) * 100, pct_unknown = (unknown - lag(unknown)) / lag(unknown) * 100, pct_nonresident = (nonresident - lag(nonresident)) / lag(nonresident) * 100, pct_grand_total = (Grand Total - lag(Grand Total)) / lag(Grand Total) * 100 )
IPEDS_yearly_pct |> gt() |> fmt_number( columns = c( aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white, two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, Grand Total ), decimals = 0 ) |> fmt_percent( columns = c( pct_aian, pct_asian, pct_black, pct_hispanic, pct_nhpi, pct_white, pct_two_or_more, pct_unknown, pct_nonresident, pct_grand_total ), decimals = 1, scale_values = FALSE ) |> cols_label( year = ŌĆ£YearŌĆØ, aian = ŌĆ£AIANŌĆØ, asian = ŌĆ£AsianŌĆØ, black = ŌĆ£BlackŌĆØ, hispanic = ŌĆ£HispanicŌĆØ, nhpi = ŌĆ£NHPIŌĆØ, white = ŌĆ£WhiteŌĆØ, two_or_more = ŌĆ£Two or MoreŌĆØ, unknown = ŌĆ£UnknownŌĆØ, nonresident = ŌĆ£NonresidentŌĆØ, Grand Total = ŌĆ£Grand TotalŌĆØ, pct_aian = ŌĆ£YoY % AIANŌĆØ, pct_asian = ŌĆ£YoY % AsianŌĆØ, pct_black = ŌĆ£YoY % BlackŌĆØ, pct_hispanic = ŌĆ£YoY % HispanicŌĆØ, pct_nhpi = ŌĆ£YoY % NHPIŌĆØ, pct_white = ŌĆ£YoY % WhiteŌĆØ, pct_two_or_more = ŌĆ£YoY % Two+ŌĆØ, pct_unknown = ŌĆ£YoY % UnknownŌĆØ, pct_nonresident = ŌĆ£YoY % NonresidentŌĆØ, pct_grand_total = ŌĆ£YoY % Grand TotalŌĆØ ) |> tab_style( style = list(cell_text(weight = ŌĆ£boldŌĆØ, transform = ŌĆ£uppercaseŌĆØ)), locations = cells_column_labels(everything()) )
